Name: Coelsanus Industria Conserve s.p.a.
Description:
INTRODUCTION TO COELSANUS
Coelsanus, founded in 1955, is an italian leading company producing preserved
vegetables in wine vinegar and oil.
Indoors area : 22.000 square metres
Total area of Coelsanus premises : 71.000 square metres
Coelsanus Company profile
Coelsanus ( the name comes from Latin, taken from the coat of arms of the village of
Sossano near Vicenza and means ‘clear and peaceful sky’) was founded in 1955
and specializes in the production of preserved vegetables.
Coelsanus contracts with local producers for preferential supplies of fresh
vegetables, locally produced, using traditional methods. Growers are urged to
maintain strict standards of production with a view to obtaining a high and consistent
quality.
Once the vegetables reach the factory they are subjected to further quality checks to
ensure they meet the required standard and to guarantee product safety and
hygiene. 
All our products are subject to strict and constant hygene and quality controls
throughout the whole process ( method HACCP ) . 
The quality system complies with ISO 9001 – ed. 2000 and has been certified by the
SGS group (certificate nr. Q.02.230). Production methods applied by Coelsanus
comply also with the requirements of IFS (International Food Standard) certification,
higher level, version 4 and BRC - Global Standard Food , issue 4, Grade A

Description:

Macunaíma offers the national and international market products with traceability and quality standards without interruption in supply during the 12 months of the year, meeting the needs and expectations of its customers and consumers.

Our mission is to produce and sell foods derived from superfruits, with a high quality standard, in order to meet and anticipate the needs and expectations of our customers.

Name: POMKO
Description:
Pomko schrijft fruitkundige cultuurhistorische verhalen waarin het zoeken, borgen en bewaren van het erfgoed omtrent oude fruitrassen centraal staat. Dit doen we door het aanplanten van boomgaarden met een rijk fruitkundig verhaal. Via gedreven onderzoek naar oude fruitrassen en het herontdekken van oude fruitrassen slagen we er in om niet alleen boeiende boomgaardprojecten aan te leggen, collecties te bewaren en te verruimen, maar evenzeer is het de bedoeling om de pomologie naar een nieuw niveau te tillen met een focus op wetenschappelijke onderbouw en geavanceerde digitalisatie ("pomologie van de 21ste eeuw"). (Pijler DETERMINATIE & CULTUURHISTORISCH ONDERZOEK)
De boomgaardprojecten ontstaan vanuit het veldwerk dat verricht wordt binnen het fruitkundig cultuurhistorisch onderzoek. Het boomgaardproject wordt van A tot Z uitgerold door Pomko. Door middel van een eigen mini-kwekerij slagen we er in om niet alledaagse fruitrassen opnieuw aan te planten binnen bijzondere boomgaardverhalen. De boomgaardprojecten van Pomko kunnen alle kanten op. Een collectieboomgaard, een thematische boomgaard tot het reconstrueren van een oorspronkelijke aanplant uit pakweg 1810 of tot het tot leven brengen van een pomologisch boek of naslagwerk… Niet zomaar boomgaarden dus, maar altijd boomgaarden met een sterk, lokaal verankerd en erfgoedkundig verhaal. (Pijler ATELIER)
Wat we van onze voorouders meekregen doorgeven aan onze (klein)kinderen. Wat Pomko, leert, ervaart, boeit, ruikt, proeft,… willen we ook doorgeven aan onze toekomstige generaties. Dat ook zij nog lange tijd snel en op een hedendaagse (lees d

Name: Permanuts
Description:
We source dried fruits and nuts for the industry, produced under the best non-intensive agricultural practices that combine cutting edge science with traditional techniques, ensuring the preservation of the environment, in symbiosis with the philosophy that gives it its name, Permaculture - aiming to create sustainable habitats by following nature's patterns.

PermaCashews
Our raw material - Raw Cashew Nut - is ethically sourced, from our own network of over 50,000 smallholder farmers in Mozambique. We are a single-country origin brand, and we can trace our kernel to the district level where it was grown.

Since we process at the source – our own factory in rural Mozambique - our cashew has a lower carbon footprint, whereas most cashew is shipped in its bulky shell, halfway around the world, in its raw state.

PermaAlmonds
Our Almond – a Wild Almond – is grown in the wilderness, many times in intercropping regimes, respecting the gestation periods, water and phytosanitary sufficiency, and the surrounding ecosystems, originating mainly from the Trás-os-Montes Region - Portugal, Iberia.

That means lower yields per hectare than the intensive grown Almonds, but a far more intense flavor and sweetness, through the preservation of its nutrients and throughout the transformation process.

Description:
Vous proposer des solutions pour conserver vos repas et ingrédients naturellement, sans produits chimiques ni conservateurs, grâce à deux méthodes efficaces :

 Conservation en bocaux stérilisés : permet de garder vos repas entre 3 et 6 mois, tout en préservant leur goût et leur valeur nutritionnelle. 

 Mise sous vide : idéale pour conserver des ingrédients secs, humides, huileux ou en poudre. 

Nous valorisons le fait maison, les produits locaux, et un mode de consommation durable et sain. 

Cette approche vous permet de gagner du temps et de l’argent : au lieu de dépenser dans le fast food, préparez vos repas en grande quantité (pour la semaine ou plus, selon votre capacité), et conservez-les pour plus tard.

Name: Falcon Trading LLC
Description:
Falcon Trading LLC is a market-leading fruits & vegetable supplier, and fresh produce distributor in Oman, headquartered in Muscat. With a multinational presence, we serve high-volume clients across the HORECA industry, including hotels, restaurants, retailers, food manufacturers, and wholesalers. Our long-standing relationships with global partners enable us to provide the finest fresh fruits and vegetables and premium products that meet the highest culinary standards.

As a leading HORECA supplier, Falcon Trading LLC caters to a diverse range of industries.

Our Expertise:
Import & Export
As a renowned fruit distributor and vegetable distributor, Falcon Trading LLC excels in sourcing the finest fresh produce from around the world. Our import and export capabilities enable us to bring high-quality fruits and vegetables to  the Sultanate of Oman swiftly.

Distribution:
Our state-of-the-art distribution network, powered by modern logistics, ensures fast and reliable delivery to clients across the HORECA industry. We offer tailored solutions to meet the unique demands of each business.

Cold Storage & Logistics:
Secure, temperature-controlled storage and efficient logistics Solutions from Falcon Trading LLC ensure your perishable goods are protected and delivered on time, maintaining optimal quality and freshness.

Name: PUREBERRY

Proizvodnja i celokupno naše poslovanje usaglašeno je sa međunarodnim standardima i naša praksa se zasniva na principima smanjenja uticaja na životnu sredinu tokom proizvodnje.

Posedovanjem sopstvenih plantaža, skladišta hladnjače sa automatskim mašinama za sortiranje i pakovanje naše transportne firme Pure Logistics doo zaokružili smo ceo proces i tok kretanja robe od polja do kupca i to je prednost saradnje sa nama.

Osim toga pružamo i logističke usluge sortiranja, pakovanja, etiketiranja, zamrzavanja i skladištenja voća povrća, a sve to u kontrolisanim temperaturnim uslovima u našem centralnom skladištu hladnjači.

Name: CocoKings
Description:
Embark on a transformative journey with Cocokings, a visionary brand founded by Anurag Gupta, committed to bringing the unique and health-packed King Coconut to North India. With twice the potassium and magnesium of green tender coconuts and 95% more electrolytes, Cocokings stands as the exclusive supplier of King Coconuts in North India, directly sourced from farmers. Anurag, drawing from a defense background, envisioned a healthier lifestyle, guiding farmers toward natural, chemical-free cultivation methods for premium quality.

Cocokings is not just a supplier; it's a catalyst for premium, health-conscious living. Our product, with 35% less sugar, serves as an ideal natural drink, even for diabetic patients, introducing Delhi NCR to premium quality coconuts. Rooted in values prioritizing both quality and quantity, Cocokings aligns seamlessly with Ayurvedic principles, providing a natural remedy to boost immunity.

At the helm is Anurag, whose journey from a defense background to corporate leadership reflects a commitment to excellence. Cocokings is more than coconuts; it's a natural remedy for nurturing health. Join us in embracing the goodness of King Coconut, where every sip is a step towards a healthier, vibrant life. Cocokings - Nurturing Health, Savoring Taste; Bringing the Best of King Coconuts to Your Doorstep.

Description:

Bursting with natural sweetness, these juicy, sun-kissed oranges have captivated taste buds for generations.

At Sargodha Kinnow, we're passionate about bringing the authentic flavors of Sargodha's finest oranges right to your doorstep. Our commitment to quality and sustainability drives us to source the freshest, most flavorful oranges directly from the orchards of Sargodha.

We understand that in today's fast-paced world, convenience is key. That's why we offer a hassle-free online ordering experience and prompt delivery services. Simply place your order, and we'll ensure that your basket of freshly picked Sargodha oranges arrives at your doorstep, ready to be enjoyed.

More than just a product, our oranges represent a connection to the rich agricultural heritage of Pakistan. With every bite, you're savoring the essence of Sargodha's fertile lands and the dedication of its farmers.

Join us on a journey of taste and tradition. Order your Sargodha oranges today and experience the difference!

Name: Stanić

We went through long and hard journey from small raspberry farmers up to the well know processors, employing 400 people, with two GFSI, Organic, Kosher, Halal, Smeta certified, as well as two HACCP certified facilities, total storage capacity of 22 000 tns, in-house laboratory in process of accreditation and in-house transport company in ownership to be able to offer all in one place service worldwide.

Name: GoodBox
Description:
Az, hogy munkahelyeket lássanak el, öt éve fogalmazódott meg bennük és ma már elmondhatják: aki egyszer rendelt tőlük, évekig visszatérő ügyfél marad.
- Volt olyan cég, ahol az első héten nem is értették, mit keres az asztalon a gyümölcs. Aztán a HR elkezdte promotálni, hogy ez mindenkié, tessék enni. A következő héttől már szabályos közelharc folyt a gyümiért, a folyosón lesték az emberek, hogy mikor érkezünk. 

Az egyedi faládákba kerülhet klasszikus, válogatás háromféle almával, banánnal, naranccsal, körtével, szőlővel és mandarinnal, de a cégek leadhatnak egyedi kéréseket is. Ananász, maracuja, sárkánygyümölcs, kókusz, vagy épp gránátalma is rendelhető. 

És hogy kiktől érkeznek a gyümölcsök?

- Az elmúlt években rengeteg magyar termelőt ismertünk meg: a hazai gyümölcsök közül az eper lajosmizsei, a kajszibarack kecskeméti, az alma ráckevei. Mindig magyar termelőkkel dolgozunk. Tudjuk, ez sok megrendelőnek fontos. 

Szállítanak 10 fős kisvállalkozásnak, de 1500 fős nagyoknak is, gyakori megrendelők az IT-val foglalkozó, az állami, a vegyipari cégek, a futárcégek és a biztosítók.

“Az irodákban dolgozók számára a gyümölcs egy apró, de fontos figyelmesség.“
“Az egészségmegőrzés ma nem extra juttatás kellene hogy legyen, hanem alapvető, mindig jelenlévő szempont. Van olyan irodánk, ahol a napi gyümölcs már benne van az álláshirdetésben!”

Name: Mercajara
Description:
Mercajara nace de la rica herencia y tradición de la familia Serrano Peralle en la agronomía del champiñón. Desde 2008, nos hemos consolidado como líderes nacionales en la producción de hongos y setas con 3.000 toneladas anuales, combinando décadas de experiencia con innovación tecnológica en el sector agroalimentario.

Nuestra oferta se estructura en cuatro líneas principales:

• HONGOS Y SETAS: Somos productores apasionados y líderes nacionales en la producción de shiitake, pleurotis, eryngii, champiñón blanco y shimeji de la más alta calidad.

• FRUTAS TROPICALES: Como importadores selectivos, traemos los sabores más impactantes del planeta, asegurando frescura y autenticidad en cada pieza.

• VERDURAS: Ofrecemos productos saludables y frescos, destacando nuestros espárragos trigueros disponibles los 365 días del año gracias a nuestras alianzas internacionales.

• TUBÉRCULOS: Nuestra variedad incluye la versátil cúrcuma, el inconfundible jengibre y otros tesoros subterráneos ricos en sabor y propiedades nutritivas.

En nuestras instalaciones de la Manchuela Conquense, dedicamos 10.500 m² al cultivo de hongos, contamos con 3.000 m² fríos de almacenaje y 2.500 m² refrigerados en la zona de picking y transformación. Nuestra flota propia de vehículos garantiza que nuestros productos lleguen en perfectas condiciones a nuestros clientes, reflejando nuestro compromiso con la distribución eficiente y cuidadosa.

Mercajara está presente en los mercados internacionales clave, repartidos a lo largo de 4 continentes. Colaboramos con más de 55 socios estratégicos que comparten nuestra pasión por el sabor. Juntos, llevamos lo mejor de nuestras tierras a cada rincón del planeta. Somos un proyecto local con una mirada global.

El verdadero corazón de Mercajara son las más de 140 personas que habitan nuestros espacios y desarrollan en ellos su labor profesional con dedicación y excelencia. Gracias a ellos, seguimos creciendo y superando nuevos desafíos cada día.

Name: Migliarese Conserve
Description:
| La nostra storia |
In un'area deputata all'agricoltura da circa 3.500 anni, nel cuore del Golfo di Squillace, lambito dalle acque cristalline del Mar Jonio, si estendono i terreni incontaminati del nostro Gruppo. Le nostre aziende, a conduzione familiare, portano avanti da 25 anni processi produttivi che tutelano antichi saperi, gusti della tradizione e proposte di unicità ed autenticità, con la passione per la buona agricoltura. Processi manuali che si coniugano alla precisione ed all'affidabilità di impianti produttivi all'avanguardia. Con orgoglio abbracciamo la filosofia “bio”, rappresentando un modello di corretto uso del territorio e di economia sostenibile, senza tralasciare l'impegno costante nel promuovere uno stile di vita a dimensione umana ed un'alimentazione sana.

| Equilibrio |
Lavorare nella nostra Azienda significa raggiungere gli obiettivi, ma con serenità e gioco di squadra. Crediamo fermamente che per raggiungere i migliori risultati serva un clima disteso ed un Team fatto di persone gratificate. 

| L'importanza di non annoiarsi |
Evitare la monotonia, anche nel lavoro, è importante per sentire di crescere professionalmente e mantenere vivo l’interesse per il lavoro. Se entrerai nel Team Migliarese, potrai entrare in contatto con tante realtà ed attività differenti. Ci occupiamo di produrre e vendere i migliori prodotti che la natura ha da offrire, curando attentamente le fasi del processo di produzione e di vendita.

| Filosofia BIO |
Migliarese ha una storia semplice, che parla di passione, di amore per la natura e di un profondo legame con i luoghi di origine. Da sempre, l'azienda sceglie di lavorare materie prime biologiche di alta qualità per offrire prodotti buoni per l'uomo e giusti per l'ambiente.  
Un impegno costante, una strada che Migliarese ha scelto di percorrere con dedizione e costanza.

Name: Itfaq Fruit Company
Description:
Itfaq Fruit Company is a prominent and trusted name in the fruit industry, dedicated to providing the highest quality fruits to customers worldwide. With a commitment to excellence and a focus on customer satisfaction, we have established ourselves as a reliable source for premium fruits.

At Itfaq Fruit Company, we understand the importance of freshness and taste. We work closely with experienced farmers and orchardists who use sustainable farming practices and adhere to strict quality control measures. This ensures that our fruits are grown naturally, without the use of harmful chemicals, and are harvested at their peak ripeness to deliver an exceptional flavor experience.

Our diverse range of fruits includes a wide variety of seasonal and exotic options. From the crisp sweetness of apples and pears to the tropical juiciness of mangoes and pineapples, we carefully curate our selection to meet the preferences of our discerning customers. Our fruits are handpicked and carefully packed to preserve their freshness and nutritional value.

At Itfaq Fruit Company, we prioritize customer satisfaction. We strive to provide exceptional service, ensuring that every order is handled with care and delivered promptly to our valued customers. Whether you are a retailer, wholesaler, or an individual consumer, we are dedicated to meeting your fruit requirements with the utmost professionalism and reliability.

With our commitment to quality, freshness, and customer service, Itfaq Fruit Company aims to become your go-to source for premium fruits. Experience the natural goodness and delectable flavors of our fruits and discover why we are the preferred choice for fruit enthusiasts worldwide.

Name: Boreal Bites Foods
Description:
Welcome to Boreal Bites Foods, your source for fresh and nutritious vegetables, fruits, and dairy goods in Canada. Our commitment to quality and sustainability is evident in everything we do, from the way we grow our crops to the way we process and package our products.
At Boreal Bites Foods, we believe that great food starts with great ingredients. That's why we work closely with local farmers and suppliers to source the freshest produce and dairy products available. We then use state-of-the-art technology and innovative techniques to turn these ingredients into delicious, healthy food that you can feel good about eating.
Whether you're a foodie looking for new and exciting ingredients to cook with, or a health-conscious consumer seeking nutritious and flavorful options for your family, Boreal Bites Foods has something for everyone. We invite you to explore our selection of fresh fruits, vegetables, and dairy goods, and to experience the difference that quality and sustainability can make in your food.

Name: Bella Contadina
Description:
Bella Contadina is the brand of Cirillo Group S.p.A. and it was born in Puglia with a simple idea: bringing the taste of our local specialties into every jar, with care and solid production standards. 

We produce and distribute a wide range of preserved foods and Italian deli specialties—from table olives to vegetables in oil and pickled products, from grilled vegetables to tomato-based sauces—with lines designed for both retail and food service.

The company was founded in 2010, but its roots go back to a family story that began in the 1960s. 

Today we operate two production sites in Orta Nova and San Giovanni Rotondo, continuously investing in processes, quality control, and innovation to ensure consistency and reliability.

We work with retail chains, Ho.Re.Ca., and importers/distributors, with a strong international focus: we export to over 60 countries, with a significant share of business abroad.

Our commitment to quality is supported by certifications such as Organic, BRC, IFS, and FDA, as well as awards including the Prodexpo Gold Medal 2018.

 For commercial enquiries, private label projects, and retail/food service formats: info@bellacontadina.it

Name: Hadyanah Farm - فلاحة هديانه
Description:
تأسست شركة فلاحة هديانه ذات المسؤولية المحدودة في عام 1972 في المملكة العربية السعودية بمنطقة القصيم في محافظة عنيزة.
 فلاحة هديانه هي شركة زراعية تركز على إنتاج التمور الطازجة والفواكه والخضروات والورقيات في السوق المحلي والخارجي باستخدام أحدث وسائل الزراعة العضوية والمائية.
 
في فلاحة هديانه نقوم باستخدام وسائل التكنولوجيا الزراعية المتقدمة والتي تدعم كفاءة الطاقة مما يتيح لنا التوفير في التكاليف التشغيلية لتحقيق أكبر قدر من الكفاءة الاقتصادية مع تنمية منتج استثنائي وعالي الجودة.
في بيئة منظمة وسريعة النمو ومع عدد سكان يقارب 35 مليون نسمة أو يزيد فإن فلاحة هديانه تساهم في هذا السوق بشكل كبير من خلال منتجاتها المتنوعة والمهمة لهذا المجتمع.

Name: MONICOM d.o.o.
Description:
The Monicom company has been successfully operating and developing since 1991 and today it is one of the most successful private companies in Serbia and a leader in the fields it deals with. The business portfolio first expanded from the energy and trade sectors to the construction material industry and later to the agriculture and fruit processing sector.

Since 2015, the company has operated one of the largest, most modern and technologically advanced factories for freezing and drying fruit in Europe, and since the beginning of 2018, Monica has owned about 420 ha of agricultural land, leased for 30 years.

Industrial complex in Aleksinac with plants for fruit processing by freezing and drying covers a land area of 6.17 ha and consists of 12 facilities for production, processing, storage, packaging, maintenance and administration. Located in the immediate vicinity of the international highway E-75, strategically and infrastructurally exceptionally positioned, given that it is on the road between Belgrade and Niš. 

The wider region - Southeast Serbia in which it is located is ideal in terms of the raw material base that surrounds it, as well as the existing preconditions for growing quality fruit, primarily cherries and plums, due to proven positive characteristics such as a high level of brix, natural aroma and taste.

Name: রাজশাহীর ফলমূল

আপনাদের আম ক্রয় করার দরকার হলে আমার ফেসবুক পেজে,লিংডিং বা ভিডিও দেখতে চাইল ইউটিউবে ভিজিট করতে পারেন মোবাইলে কথা বলতে চাইলে আমার ফেসবুক লিংডিং পেজে আমার নাম্বার দেওয়া আছে ইমু হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ টেলিগ্রাম সকল মাধ্যমে যোগাযোগ করতে পারেন।

Name: NET-PROFIT Warzywa & Owoce
Description:
EN: We deliver top-quality products to retail chains, grocery stores, as well as vegetable and fruit wholesalers.

ES: Entregamos productos de la más alta calidad a cadenas de tiendas, supermercados, así como a mayoristas de frutas y verduras.

IT: Forniamo prodotti di altissima qualità a catene di negozi, supermercati e anche a ingrossatori di frutta e verdura.


Nasza firma w branży owocowo-warzywnej jest od 2002 roku, stale się rozwijając i poszerzając ofertę. Dzięki wieloletniemu doświadczeniu w branży spożywczej i bardzo dobrej znajomości rynku owoców i warzyw, oferujemy naszym klientom bezpieczny i najwyższej jakości produkt. Duża różnorodność asortymentu oraz dbałość o każdy szczegół działalności, stanowi trzon naszej firmy.

Dla nas zawsze był i jest najważniejszy klient, dlatego zwracamy dużą uwagę na punktualność dostaw i profesjonalną obsługę wszystkich naszych kontrahentów. Ilość sprowadzanych przez nas owoców i warzyw wzrasta systematycznie z roku na rok.

Dostarczamy produkty najwyższej jakości do sieci handlowych, sklepów spożywczych, a także do hurtowni warzyw i owoców. Od wielu lat importujemy warzywa i owoce głównie z takich krajów jak: Włochy, Hiszpania, Francja, Niemcy, Holandia, Belgia. Posiadamy wiarygodnych i przede wszystkim sprawdzonych dostawców z rynków europejskich oraz z poza Unii posiadających certyfikaty jakości Globalgap oraz BRC. Eksportujemy również Polskie warzywa i owoce do krajów Unii Europejskiej.

Posiadamy hale magazynowe i produkcyjne wyposażone w najnowszy sprzęt, który jest obsługiwany przez wykwalifikowany personel. Zapewniamy szeroki wachlarz usług od składowania i magazynowania produktów począwszy, poprzez pakowanie i załadunek. W celu zapewnienia ciągłości dostaw, współpracujemy z wieloma gospodarstwami rolnymi w kraju, natomiast żeby dostarczyć gotowy towar, na czas posiadamy tabor swoich samochodów firmowych.

Name: Berry Andes
Description:
Berry Andes is a Colombian family own company, a producer of blueberries of the finest quality. All our blueberry varieties meet strict market criteria for size, taste firmness, color, natural bloom, longer shelf life, and juiciness.  We aspire to produce supreme quality berries by combining responsible farming practices supported by a strong culture of responsibility and deep social involvement.
Our farms are located in the municipality of Madrid, north of Bogota, Colombia. With an altitude of 8 000 ft. above sea level, the humid, northern climate with winter chills, mild summers, and low-pH acidic soils joins the perfect conditions to grow the large size, supreme appearance, and exquisite blueberries. In addition, being located on the equator allows the constant production of blueberries during all months of the year.
The main varieties of cultivated blueberries are Emerald, Flicker*, Farthing* and Primadonna* (*exclusive varieties of University of Florida)
We constantly work to improve the conditions of protection and safety of our fruits and annually certify our farms under Global GAP and GRASP standards.  

Why choose Berry Andes? 

•	It’s super Fresh! 
We guarantee the freshness of our blueberries with only 3 days of harvest time before shipment and 3 days of lead time to every destination across the globe via air freight.
•	We offer an exceptional taste. We are intent on growing the best quality blueberries on the global market. This means that taste, crunch and flavor are our priorities. To do so, we carefully select the right blueberry varieties to plant according to our soil and climate conditions. Additionally, our blueberries are picked and packed manually to maximize bloom retention and shelf life. 
•	We are committed to the highest quality standards.
We are certified and audited every year with the Global Gap, the world's leading farm assurance program. Our standards don’t allow any agrochemicals and absolutely no pesticides containing glyphosate

Name: Ndigo Enterprises
Description:
Ndigo Enterprise is a pioneering agricultural company focused on revolutionizing the banana industry through innovation, sustainability, and technology. As the CEO and Founder, I established Ndigo Enterprise with a vision to address the inefficiencies in the traditional banana supply chain and create a more transparent, equitable, and environmentally friendly ecosystem for farmers, consumers, and the company alike.

At Ndigo Enterprise, we are committed to fostering direct connections between banana farmers and our company through a user-friendly digital platform. This platform serves as a centralized hub for farmers to submit their produce, receive real-time pricing information, and track their sales progress. Simultaneously, consumers can access detailed insights about our bananas, including their origin, cultivation methods, and nutritional value, promoting transparency and informed purchasing decisions.

Moreover, Ndigo Enterprise integrates cutting-edge technologies,, such as IoT devices and blockchain,, into the supply chain to enhance transparency and traceability. By deploying IoT sensors on banana plantations and leveraging blockchain technology to create an immutable record of each banana's journey, we ensure authenticity and transparency throughout the supply chain.

Through these initiatives and our commitment to sustainability, Ndigo Enterprise aims to revolutionize the banana industry, promote ethical farming practices, and deliver high-quality bananas to consumers while empowering farmers and driving positive change in the agricultural sector.

Name: Raw Agro
Description:
Bangladesh is an Agricular country. About 70% of people are linked to agriculture. We manufacture GAP ( Good Agricultural Practices ). Bangladesh has a diverse range of vegetables that are grown and consumed across the country. Some of the most popular vegetables in Bangladesh include:

Eggplant: This is a staple vegetable in Bangladeshi cuisine and is used in dishes such as curries and chutneys.

green chili: green chili is widely grown in Bangladesh and is used in a variety of dishes, including Currie and snacks.

Potato: Potatoes are widely grown in Bangladesh and are used in a variety of dishes, including curries, stews, and snacks.

Tomato: Tomatoes are used in many Bangladeshi dishes, including curries, soups, and salads.

Onion: Onions are used extensively in Bangladeshi cuisine, both as a vegetable and as a spice.

Cauliflower: Cauliflower is a popular vegetable in Bangladesh and is often used in curries and other dishes.

Okra: Okra, also known as lady's fingers, is a popular vegetable in Bangladesh and is often used in curries and stews.

Spinach: Spinach is a leafy green vegetable that is widely consumed in Bangladesh and is often used in curries and side dishes.

Pumpkin: Pumpkins are a popular vegetable in Bangladesh and are used in curries, stews, and soups.

Cabbage: Cabbage is a widely consumed vegetable in Bangladesh and is often used in salads, stews, and curries.

Bitter gourd: Bitter gourd, also known as bitter melon, is a popular vegetable in Bangladesh and is often used in curries and stir-fries.

These are just a few examples of the many vegetables that are grown and consumed in Bangladesh. The country's rich and diverse cuisine is heavily influenced by the availability of fresh vegetables and other agricultural products.

Name: SavaniFarms
Description:
Savani Farms brings to you the natural delicacies of Indian mango and mango products.

Our offering is the best of India: “Kesar”, “Alphonso “and other popular Indian mangoes.

“Kesar” is the queen of mangoes, widely grown in the Gujarat state of India. It has a unique golden saffron glow, a rich smooth pulp and sweet intense flavor that tease your taste buds. It is mainly characterized by its unique gold color with green overtones. The fruit weighs approximately 200-300 grams.

Savani Farms offers the very best of Kesar naturally ripened fruit as “Queen Kesar”

“Alphonso” is also among the finest of Indian mangoes. It is the reigning king among Indian fruits. The Alphonso mango is found along the verdant shore of the Konkan region in Maharashtra, India. The fruit weighs approximately 250-300 grams. Alphonso is bright yellow with a pink blush on the sun exposed shoulder. A ripened Alphonso spreads a wonderful sweet and fruity aroma tantalizing to anyone's palette. It has a flavor that is intensely sweet, rich and full, with multiple aromatic overtones and a hint of citrus.

Nearly 41% of the mangoes produced in the world come from India and none taste like the Kesar or Alphonso.

The sweetness and flavor of Kesar and Alphonso go way beyond the word “delicious” and a slice of this fruit, as many will describe, “A Slice of Paradise”, is truly a “Slice of Heaven on the Earth”.

No other fruit compares with the Indian Mango - It is truly the King of Fruits.

Corporate Social Responsibility

It has long been the dream of Savani Farms to make efforts towards improving the socio-economic standards of the underprivileged farmers in India. Mango trade in India is heavily controlled by contractors and middlemen. The small farmers that depend on them for the sale of their mangoes end up receiving a very small portion of the profit.

Name: Pedias Dried Fruits And Vegetables
Description:
Pedias Tarım was established in Çukurova's fertile soil with the aim of producing, processing and converting fresh fruits and vegetables into value-added derivatives in a healthy and natural way. The name of our business comes from Kilikya Pedias, which was the known name of the Çukurova region during the Hellenistic and Ancient Roman periods.

For many years, we have been producing citrus and other fruit types in our agricultural enterprises located in the Çukurova region. We aim to deliver the fruits and vegetables we produce to our customers by processing them in an environmentally friendly, healthy and technological way in our modern facility that we established in 2021, turning them into dried fruits and vegetables and fruit-vegetable powders.

In our facility, fruits and vegetables are first carefully selected, washed by machines and chopped. Afterwards, it is dried in closed ovens without adding any additives, sugar or preservatives. After drying, it is packaged in a completely closed environment without adding any preservatives. Thanks to the drying system we use, there are no microbes, aflatoxins or molds in the products.
We offer our products to our customers as healthy snacks and as food raw materials.
Thanks to the rich agricultural production and logistical advantages of the region we are in, our products are processed in the freshest form and delivered to our customers by land, air and sea under the most suitable conditions.

Name: Devgad Alphonso
Description:
Devgad Hapus

Devgad is a coastal town in Sindhudurg District of Maharashtra, in western India. It is a natural harbour Arabian Sea in the Konkan region of Maharashtra, located off NH 17, 200 km from Goa and 500 km from Mumbai. It is loved by tourists for its clean, sparkling beaches and the fort Vijaydurg, the place where Helium was discovered. The historical Kunkeshwar Temple is also an attraction in Devgad as it attracts a large number of devotees round the year.

Devgad produces the king of Alphonso and just like a king, it requires cultivation with utmost care. It is the Hapus or Alphonso mango that brings world fame for Devgad. The mango cultivar grown in Devgad is best among all mango because of its unique flavour, taste, shape, colour and sweetness. Because of its fan following, many other varieties are sold in the market as Devgad Hapus. The Devgad variety can be identified by its saffron-yellow colour and thin skin. It has no fibre content, and unlike other mangoes, it can be peeled like a banana, without pulling out the kernel.

Name: Frozen Harvest
Description:
With over 25 years of experience in the frozen foods industry, we have become a trusted leader known for quality, innovation, and reliability. In January 2025, we marked a major milestone by acquiring Bajpai Refrigeration, a respected company with a strong legacy — expanding our operations into the frozen peas business.

At the core of our success is our commitment to delivering premium frozen products that retain the natural taste, texture, and nutritional value of fresh produce. We achieve this through the use of advanced Individual Quick Freezing (IQF) machines, which allow us to freeze each pea rapidly and individually. This ensures superior product quality, extended shelf life, and maximum convenience for our customers.

Our state-of-the-art factory, equipped with cutting-edge IQF technology, enables us to meet the highest standards of food safety, hygiene, and sustainability. We work closely with farmers and suppliers to source the finest raw materials and are proud to offer products that meet the evolving needs of both domestic and international markets.

Backed by a dedicated team, we continue to innovate, grow, and deliver on our promise of quality. As we look ahead, we remain committed to bringing wholesome, delicious, and convenient frozen foods to tables around the world.

Name: Pitpat Colombia
Description:
En PitPat transformamos la manera de hacer mercado en Colombia.  Nuestro propósito es claro: conectar directamente el campo con las familias y negocios del país, eliminando intermediarios para garantizar calidad, frescura y precios justos tanto para el consumidor como para quienes trabajan la tierra: nuestros campesinos.

Somos más que una plataforma de domicilios; somos un puente entre quienes producen y quienes disfrutan de los alimentos. En cada pedido llevamos mucho más que frutas, verduras, carnes o productos frescos: entregamos confianza, apoyo al agro colombiano y la certeza de que juntos construimos un mercado más justo y sostenible.

 Nuestra propuesta de valor:

Sin intermediarios: más oportunidades para el campesino y mejores precios para ti.

Calidad garantizada: seleccionamos cuidadosamente cada producto, llevando lo mejor del campo a tu mesa.

Impacto social real: apoyamos a las familias campesinas, dándoles visibilidad y reconocimiento.

Experiencia cercana: hacemos de tu mercado una experiencia fácil, rápida y con sentido.

Con PitPat, comprar deja de ser una tarea rutinaria para convertirse en un acto de conciencia y bienestar. Cada pedido es una historia de esfuerzo, tradición y frescura que inicia en las manos de quienes cultivan nuestra tierra y termina en la satisfacción de tu hogar o negocio.

 Únete a la revolución de los mercados sin intermediarios. Descubre cómo juntos podemos transformar la forma de consumir y apoyar lo nuestro.

En PitPat, no solo llevamos productos. Llevamos campo, frescura y propósito.

Name: Łakomiak
Description:
"Łakomiak" - Pomidory z Polskiej Rodzinnej Tradycji 

 O nas:
Jesteśmy polską rodziną z pasją do pomidorów od 1976 roku. Nasza firma "Łakomiak" to wynik ciężkiej pracy i miłości do natury, która zaowocowała nowym gospodarstwem ogrodniczym w 1999 roku. Od tego czasu konsekwentnie rozwijamy naszą produkcję, stawiając na smak i jakość naszych pomidorów.

 Nasza Polska Tożsamość:
Czerpiemy dumę z bycia polską firmą i chcemy to pokazać konsumentom. Nasze pomidory są w pełni wyprodukowane w Polsce, dbamy o lokalność i wspieramy rodzime rolnictwo.

 Elastyczność i Dostępność:
Jako "Łakomiak" wiemy, jak ważne jest zapewnienie elastycznych dostaw, by zaspokoić oczekiwania naszych klientów. Dążymy do tego, by nasze pomidory były dostępne w różnych miejscach i czasach, aby zadowolić naszych odbiorców.

 Firma Rodzinna:
Nasza firma jest dumna z długoletniej tradycji rodzinnej, która trwa od 1976 roku. Z nami otrzymujesz pomidory, które są wyhodowane z miłością i dbałością o każdy szczegół.

 Dążenie do Rozwoju:
Pragniemy stale powiększać obszar naszej działalności. Naszym celem jest dotarcie do większej liczby klientów i pozyskanie nowych partnerów, aby rozszerzyć nasze oddziaływanie na rynek.

 Zaufany Zespół:
Nasz zespół to ponad 50 oddanych pracowników, którzy wkładają serce w naszą firmę. Razem działamy jako jedno, by dostarczyć Ci najsmaczniejsze pomidory z naszej polskiej rodziny.

Wybierając "Łakomiak", wybierasz jakość, smak i polską tradycję. Dziękujemy za wsparcie, jakie dajesz naszej rodzinnej firmie od ponad 45 lat! 

#Łakomiak #PolskiePomidory #RodzinnaTradycja #SmakPolski #JakośćZPaszją #ElastyczneDostawy #DumniZTradycji #FirmaRodzinna #ZaufanyZespół

Ontdek ons brede assortiment fruitbomen met groeigarantie en ervaar de kwaliteit en zorg die wij in elke boom stoppen.

Name: פרי על הבר - מגשי פירות ואירוח
Description:
שלום לכם ונעים מאוד, קוראים לי אלינור ואני בת לדור שלישי של חקלאים. אבא שלי הוא אבי המושבניק חקלאי מעל 40 שנה ואת זה הוא ירש מסבי. הרעיון לעסק מגשי פירות מעוצבים נולד עם האהבה והחיבור לאדמה, לטריות ולזמינות היומיומית לפירות. גדלתי וחונכתי במושב מצליח עם אחיי, היינו מבקרים בשדות של אבי מידי שבוע ונהנים מהתוצרת הטרייה.

בעצם “פרי על הבר” הפך להיות הבייבי שלנו וכל המשפחה נרתמה להקמת העסק ותפעולה עד היום. אני והצוות שאיתי בוחרים לכם מידי יום את פירות הפרימיום הטובים ביותר ללא פשרות כלל ברמה מאוד דקדוקית על מנת שנרכיב לכם את המגש הכי טעים שיש, שמים דגש על טריות ועובדים אך ורק לפני הזמנות. הפירות נחתכים באסתטיות מוחלטת ובעיצוב ייחודי שהוא רק שלנו! אני מאמינה בשקיפות מלאה ומקדישה המון זמן ומשאבים כדי שתיהיו מרוצים! בנוסף אנו מעדכנים מעת לעת את המגשים באתר בכדי שתדעו בדיוק מה אתם מקבלים ואיזה פירות לפי העונה.

התמונות באתר אלו מגשים שנשלחו ללקוחות ולא צולמו לצורך קטלוג בלבד.

בסיום ההזמנה ישלח אליכם תמונה לוואצאפ של המגש שהזמנתם גם אם הוא לא עבורכם! באתר שלנו ניתן למצוא מגוון מגשים שיכולים להתאים לסוג אירועים שונים כמו ימי הולדת, מתנה ליולדת, אירועי חברה, ימי נישואים, עידוד לבידוד, יום אהבה, חתונות, בר/בת מצווה, בריתות, ניחום אבלים ועוד המון אפשריות… ואפילו סתם כהוכרת תודה! מעבר לפלטות פירות, יש לנו גם מגשי סושי פירות וסושי שוקולד, מגשי ירקות, קינוחים, בלונים, יינות, שוקולדים עוד.. ואפילו שולחן פירות לאירועים שמתאימים לכם לפי כמות מוזמנים.

עדיין פה?

אז למה אתם מחכים, בחרו את המגש שתרצו ואנחנו נדאג לספק אותו בצורה הכי טובה שיש ואתם רק תדאגו לקבל את המחמאות!

שלכם, אלינור

Name: "Gacek" Producent warzyw obieranych
Description:
Jesteśmy producentem warzyw obieranych z siedzibą w Skrzynkach pod Kórnikiem, działającym na rynku świeżej żywności dla sektora HoReCa, cateringu i zakładów żywienia zbiorowego. Naszą specjalnością są obrane ziemniaki i warzywa gotowe do bezpośredniego użycia, dostarczane codziennie do kuchni profesjonalistów.

Nasza siła tkwi w prostocie: świeży surowiec, rzetelna obróbka, uczciwa cena i terminowa dostawa. Dzięki lokalnej produkcji i bezpośrednim relacjom z klientami oferujemy elastyczność i szybkość reakcji.

Współpracujemy z firmami przetwórstwa spożywczego, restauracjami, cateringami, hotelami i stołówkami. Wiemy, jak ważna w kuchni jest organizacja pracy i jakość półproduktu – dlatego bierzemy na siebie pracochłonne etapy przygotowania warzyw, by nasi klienci mogli skupić się na gotowaniu.

Zaufaj sprawdzonemu dostawcy, który zna Twoje potrzeby.

Name: Star International
Description:
We at Star International are engaged in wholesale and retail sectors we export Indian produce to Various European destinations and import a complete range of fruit and vegetables from around the world. In India, our professional team of inspection staff and sales organizations ensure reliability and quality with growers. With so much experience and knowledge at our fingertips we are able to respond quickly to customers’ special requirements. Besides the conventional range we are also always on the look-out for specialties or novelties.

 

We export all over Europe and beyond. To make sure your orders run as smoothly as possible, our staff are well trained to attend any requirements.

 

We deliver everything from mixed pallets to mixed shipments (up to as many as 150 items), from complete pallets of Indian produce to complete shipments of imported products. You can also place your export documentation in our capable hands.

 

Our import and export logistics activities are based in Mumbai, Ahmedabad, Mundra and Pipavav in the western part of India. Many of our products originate from growers and cooperatives located here, and many products for import and export are shipped via the nearby portS. In India, we work closely with a logistics partner who takes care of shipping, order picking and quality control. Our transshipment centre is both BRC and HACCP certified.

 

MISSION

Our mission is to be the best value creator for the food processing business in India. We truly believe in thinking local and acting global and are proud to sell products grown in India to the rest of the world.

 

VISION

At Star International believe in long-term value creation and growth not just to our customers but also to all stakeholders in the supply chain including our suppliers and employees. For this trust and good business practices are embedded in our DNA.

Name: PT. Natura Agritek Sejahtera
Description:
At Natura, our purpose is creating well-being with love for nature. Established in 2023, our core team has nearly 50 years of combined experience in fruit and vegetable processing industry.

We believe nature is essential for human life. Nature provides us with everything we need. The rise of technology and industry may have distanced us superficially from nature, but it has not changed our reliance on the natural world: most of what we use and consume on a daily basis remains the product of multitudes of interactions within nature.

As an archipelago of more than 17,000 islands, Indonesia is blessed with fertile soil and rich mega-biodiversity. However the large geographic area and people spread out across more than 6,000 inhabited islands out of 17,000 islands brings huge challenge for the growers due to perishable nature of the crops.

Utilizing state of the art technology, our facility in Cikupamas is built to preserve the color, flavor, texture, and nutrition while prolonging the shelf life of perishable fruits and vegetables.

We are working with the right suppliers in the right way, we are exist to make a difference and improving lives of Indonesian growers. For customers we provide a broad range of solutions that match consumer demands for healthy products, taste good, clean label, and natural ingredients.

We connect Nature, People and Innovation.

We believe in everything we do, our mission is to bring nature's goodness to enable creation of healthier and tastier food & beverages, everyday.

Earn more money in your business and for your customers:
 - Up to 25% less food waste

 - No chemicals, completely natural

Name: AC EPISKOPIS - AGRICULTURAL COOPERATIVE OF EPISKOPI / ΑΓΡΟΤΙΚΟΣ ΣΥΝΕΤΑΙΡΙΣΜΟΣ ΕΠΙΣΚΟΠΗΣ
Description:
Episkopi Agricultural Cooperative (AC Episkopis) is a leading producer organization in Northern Greece with a history dating back to 1956. Initially established as a credit cooperative, it evolved into a fruit trading organization and took its current legal form in 1987 under Greek Law 1544/1985. Recognized by the European Union as a Producer Organization, ASEpiskopis operates with more than 250 active members who cultivate over 7,000 acres of farmland.

The cooperative produces and distributes over 10,000 tons of fresh fruit annually, including kiwifruit, peaches, nectarines, cherries, plums, pears, apricots, apples, and persimmons. All products are carefully harvested, sorted, packed, and marketed by the cooperative.

Approximately 60% of our production is exported to international markets such as the USA, Saudi Arabia, the Philippines, India, Poland, Czech Republic, Spain, and Italy, while the remaining 40% is distributed within Greece through supermarket chains and selected wholesalers.

AC Episkopis employs 10 permanent staff members and around 80 seasonal workers during peak periods. The cooperative is governed by a 5-member Board of Directors and a 3-member Supervisory Committee, each with a four-year term.

Our Mission

Our Vision

To become the most trusted and respected regional center for natural forest products by combining tradition, sustainability, and modern processing standards.

Name: TRND Food
Description:
TRND Food, a proud subsidiary of TRNDGROUP, is a pioneering force in the global trade of cocoa beans, coffee, sesame, and an array of fruits and vegetables sourced directly from Africa. At the heart of our operations lies a commitment to excellence, sustainability, and fostering economic empowerment within African communities.

With a keen focus on quality and authenticity, TRND Food ensures that every product we offer encapsulates the rich flavors and unique characteristics of African agriculture. From the lush cocoa plantations to the sun-kissed coffee estates, we work closely with local farmers and suppliers to bring you the finest ingredients that Africa has to offer.

Our dedication to ethical sourcing extends beyond mere transactions; we believe in building long-lasting partnerships that benefit all stakeholders involved. By cutting out unnecessary intermediaries and establishing direct trade channels, we empower African farmers to receive fair compensation for their hard work while providing our customers with unparalleled freshness and quality.

One of the cornerstones of our business philosophy is sustainability. We recognize the importance of preserving the environment and supporting eco-friendly practices throughout the supply chain. From implementing responsible farming techniques to reducing carbon emissions in transportation, we strive to minimize our ecological footprint and contribute to a healthier planet for future generations.

As a proud member of ONEAFRICAEXPO, TRND Food embraces the opportunity to showcase the diverse bounty of African agriculture on a global stage. This prestigious platform not only allows us to exhibit our products but also serves as a forum for exchanging ideas, forging new partnerships, and driving positive change within the industry.

Name: Goodberry
Description:
At Goodberry, we're more than a fruit and vegetable preserves manufacturing company. We're the culmination of a family's dream, rooted in a clear vision and unwavering mission. Since our inception in 2001, we've been on a journey to harness the essence of modern agricultural production, weaving tradition with innovation.

Our passion lies in crafting exceptional products from the finest raw materials found in our Bosnian landscape: from luscious raspberries and succulent strawberries to the richness of blackberries, forest fruits, plums, apples, pears, and even the healing power of medicinal plants. We take pride in preserving these treasures for your enjoyment.

Beyond our preserves, Goodberry offers an array of services – from cold fruit squeezing, pasteurization, drying, to grinding products. We're also dedicated to supporting our fellow growers and producers, assisting them in accessing funds to further their interests.

But Goodberry is more than just a business; it's a journey we invite you to be a part of. Join us in exploring the picturesque Mahnjača mountain and local villages through our curated tourist services, featuring gastronomic delights and cultural experiences.

Our tagline says it all: 'Goodberry - home is the most beautiful!' Come taste the fruits of our labor and experience the heart of Bosnia through our crafted preserves. Together, let's continue this story of the future.
Location: Žepče, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

Name: Swadeshi Farming
Description:
Swadeshi Farming Limited specializes in providing organic products to customers. Our main goal
is to produce, process, and sell agricultural products such as crops, livestock, and forestry products while maintaining standardization and approval by government authorities. We Cultivate a specific type of product or operate across multiple sectors of the agriculture industry
and implement a variety of techniques to maximize productivity and efficiency including
advanced farming technologies, genetic engineering, and the use of synthetic fertilizers and
pesticides or genetically modified organisms (GMOs).
We also focus on sustainability and environmental responsibility, using practices such as croprotation, natural pest control, and soil conservation to reduce environmental impact. Additionally, We also prioritize social responsibility, ensuring that our workers are treated fairly and that
products are ethically sourced from local farmers and producers who use sustainable farming
practices. Our products are free from synthetic fertilizers, pesticides, and other chemicals. We
offer a wide variety of organic fruits, vegetables, grains, and other food items as well as provide
organic health and beauty products, organic clothing, and home goods. Our mission is to
provide customers with the highest quality agricultural products while supporting local farmers
and producers.
Besides all activities, we also try to spread knowledge by selling books related to the religion of
Islam. We offer a variety of books on topics such as Quranic studies, Hadith, Islamic history,
jurisprudence, theology, spirituality, and other related subjects as well as Islamic clothing, prayer mats, and other Islamic merchandise. We believe in our morality and always Donate a portion of our Profit to unprivileged, backward poor people to sustain their lives happily.

Name: ErNoto
Description:
Ernoto is an innovative startup project that aims to redefine urban vegetable access and sustainability. This venture is dedicated to providing rapid and eco-friendly organic vegetable delivery services to urban dwellers, ensuring they have convenient access to fresh and healthy produce.

Key features and aspects of the Ernoto startup or project include:

Rapid Vegetable Delivery: Ernoto's core promise is the delivery of organic vegetables to customers within just 30 minutes, regardless of their location within the city. This commitment to speed and convenience sets Ernoto apart from traditional grocery shopping and food delivery services.

Eco-Friendly Practices: Ernoto places a strong emphasis on sustainability. They source their vegetables from local, organic farms, reducing the carbon footprint associated with transportation. Additionally, the use of eco-friendly packaging materials further minimizes environmental impact.

Transparency: Ernoto is committed to providing customers with transparency in the sourcing of their vegetables. Detailed information about the farms and farmers behind the produce is made available to foster trust and traceability.

Online Platform: Ernoto operates through an online platform, such as a website or mobile app, where customers can easily browse a wide selection of organic vegetables, place orders, and make secure electronic payments.

Convenience: Ernoto's user-friendly platform and swift delivery service cater to the busy lifestyles of urban residents. Customers can save time and effort by having fresh produce delivered directly to their doorstep.

Support for Local Farmers: Ernoto actively supports local farmers by sourcing their organic vegetables. This partnership not only ensures freshness but also contributes to the economic growth of local communities and encourages sustainable farming practices.

Continuous Improvement: Ernoto listens to customer feedback and strives for continuous improvement in its services and offering

Name: Sapori di Nonna Tina
Description:
“Sapori di nonna Tina”, nasce a Modica nel 2015 dal lavoro e dalla passione del titolare “Roberto Caccamo” e della moglie “Lorenza Sgandurra”, si estende su una superficie operativa di 1300 mq ed è un’azienda artigianale, evoluzione naturale di un’azienda più piccola gestita dalla coppia sin dal 1991, per far fronte alla richiesta del mercato e per dare, con il nuovo marchio “Sapori di nonna Tina”, un’identità ai nostri eccellenti prodotti.
Un’identità che riportasse ai ricordi e ai sapori delle nonne. Sapori tradizionali, gustosi e ricchi del profumo tipico del profumo della terra di Sicilia.

Figura illustrativa Sapori di Nonna Tina
Oggi l’azienda ha la produzione e la vendita di conserve siciliane, conserve sott’olio, conserve sott’aceto, frutta secca, olio extravergine d’oliva, olive verdi e nere siciliane, origano siciliano, carciofi sott'olio, pomodori secchi, pomodori ciliegini, pomodoro capuliato siciliano, sott’aceti, sott’oli, specialità e spezie.
Al fine di realizzare prodotti di qualità, il titolare, Roberto Caccamo, segue con cura tutte le fasi del processo produttivo, dalla selezione dei fornitori alla scelta delle materie prime fino alla realizzazione dei prodotti, rielaborando le tradizionali ricette delle massaie siciliane, trasformando semplici prodotti della terra in supremi protagonisti della tavola.

Le innovazioni nel ciclo produttivo hanno permesso a “Sapori di nonna Tina” di elevare gli standard qualitativi dei prodotti e di soddisfare i consumatori più esigenti, anche grazie alla comodità della vendita online dei nostri prodotti tipici siciliani
“Sapori di nonna Tina”, è anche un centro ricette con bollo CE, dove è possibile inventare, testare e realizzare nuovi piatti pronti a seconda della richiesta dei nostri clienti.

Name: Happy Farmers Family
Description:
Happy Farmers Family, established in 2019, is committed to redefining the standards of premium fruit supply in the South Asian Market. With a focus on sourcing fresh, premium fruits year-round from a carefully selected network of over 40 growers, the company has made its mark in the region.
Operating across Southeast Asian markets such as Thailand, Philippines, Malaysia, Singapore, China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, and Indonesia, Happy Farmers Family utilizes a diverse range of distribution channels, including major department stores, traditional markets, supermarkets, e-commerce platforms, and its own retail outlets, ensuring efficient delivery to consumers.
In 2022, the company expanded its global presence by establishing a strategic branch in Canada, enabling it to better cater to evolving consumer demands while maintaining operational excellence. The following year, Happy Farmers Family achieved a remarkable milestone by surpassing its annual target, sourcing and supplying an impressive 15,000 tons of premium fruits to its esteemed clientele. Additionally, the company's inaugural shipment to Russia marked the beginning of its endeavour to introduce Asian fruits to the Russian market.
With an unwavering commitment to expansion and innovation, Happy Farmers Family is poised to extend its reach to the Middle East, solidifying its position as a global leader in fruit sourcing and distribution. The company prides itself on being more than just a purveyor of fruits; it is dedicated to enriching lives through the unparalleled quality and freshness of its offerings, striving to deliver the Right Fruit, at the Right Time, and in the Right Place, to discerning consumers worldwide.
Location: New Taipei City 220351, Gongyuan St., Banqiao

Notre produit phare est la purée de tomates Laïda, elle est 100% naturelle., sans additif. Elle est fabriquée  à partir d'une sélection rigoureuse de tomates fraîches cultivées localement et à un processus de transformation maîtrisé. Nous garantissons goût authentique, texture consistante et respect de la santé.

Chez ETRAFELL, nous croyons au potentiel de l’agriculture sénégalaise et au rôle clé de la transformation pour dynamiser l’économie locale, créer de l’emploi et réduire la dépendance aux importations alimentaires.

 Nos engagements : naturel, local, respect de l'environnement
 Nos partenaires : producteurs locaux, distributeurs, points de vente de proximité
 Notre vision : Créer un système alimentaire avec des produits 100% naturels qui valorisent les richesses agricoles et respectent la santé des consommateurs.

AGRO ETG, we specialize in the sourcing, trading, and distribution of high-quality agricultural commodities across global markets. With a strong network of suppliers and logistics partners, we ensure efficient, reliable, and sustainable solutions for businesses in the food and agriculture sectors.

Our Services:
 Commodity Trading & Supply – We provide bulk supply of essential agricultural products, including sugar, grains, oilseeds, pulses, and other key commodities.

 Sourcing & Procurement – Leveraging our extensive network, we source premium-quality agricultural products directly from farmers, cooperatives, and leading producers.

 Logistics & Supply Chain Solutions – We offer end-to-end logistics management, ensuring timely and cost-effective delivery of commodities worldwide.

 Market Intelligence & Advisory – We provide insights on market trends, pricing, and risk management strategies to optimize procurement and trade decisions.

 Sustainable & Ethical Sourcing – Our commitment to sustainability ensures responsible sourcing, benefiting both the environment and farming communities.

 Connecting Markets, Ensuring Quality, Driving Growth 

Partner with AGRO ETG for seamless, efficient, and transparent agricultural trade solutions.

Name: Glade Groensager
Description: Glade Groensager A/S er startet af Michael og Charlotte i 2001, da de overtog gartneriet efter Michael’s forældre som her også dyrkede grøntsager. I 2004 gik Michael sammen med brødrene Søren og Peter, om at drive Glade Groensager A/S. De to brødre havde også selv overtaget deres gartnerier af deres forældre. Ejerskabet blev på den måde ligeligt fordelt og drevet på denne måde frem til 2020, hvor de valgte at indgå et samarbejde med Martin, som også havde overtaget et gartneri efter sin far. Alle 3 familier er ligeledes fra Otterup på Nordfyn, så udover den fælles ambition om at drive bæredygtigt gartneri med omtanke for miljøet, så er det hele også lokalt forankret på Nordfyn.

Name: CIRIC AGRO doo
Description:
This is not an ordinary story. This is a special fairy tale that doesn’t begin with 'Once upon a time...' Our modern fairy tale is happening now, in the so-called Serbian Tirol, on the sun-drenched slopes of Titel Hill. The village of Titel, on the Tisa River, near Novi Sad, with more than 250 sunny days a year, provides the ideal ground for the cultivation of our orchards.

Today, we can proudly boast an impressive area of 280 hectares of the most modern apple varieties, which fully meet the high standards of even the most discerning customers. Yields are maximized, and the percentage of first-class apples is exceptionally high.

Join us in experiencing the excellence of our meticulously cultivated apple orchards on Titel Hill, where every harvest reflects our dedication to quality and innovation, perfectly suited to meet the demands of even the most discerning customers.

Name: P2S Food Processes
Description:
*What is Freeze Dried ??*

Freeze drying, also known as lyophilization or cryodesiccation, is a low-temperature dehydration process that involves freezing the product and lowering pressure, removing the ice by sublimation.
In Simple words remove the moisture from the food product without losing the Original taste, Color, Favorite, and Nutritional Value. 
Freeze-drying is a form of dehydration that removes a product's water content by turning it from ice to vapor.
Suitable for Travellers, Students, Corporate Canteens, Hospitals, and HoReCa.


Why Choose Freeze Dried:- 

1. Just add Hot Boiling Water, No Extra Effort is Needed.
2. The product retains its natural taste, aroma, and color without losing its 3. nutritional value.
3. No added Chemicals and Preservatives.
4. The products are extremely lightweight, easy to carry and have a longer shelf-life of up to 12-18 months without refrigeration.


All the Fruits and Vegetables can be procured and preserved for a longer time without adding any Additives, Colors, or Chemicals..!! 100% Natural..!!! We called it Superfood..!!!. 

The Freeze Dried Fruits or Vegetables can be used in Smoothies, Shakes, and Ice-Creams, Soups, or Consumed as snacks.

E.g. Mango, Strawberry, Mulberry, Gooseberry, Banana, Chikoo, Anjeeer (Fig), Guava (Peru), Apple, Kale, Parsley, Basil, Celery, Palak, Broccoli, Carrot, Bottle Gourd, Ash Gourd, Red Pumpkin, Green Peas, Sweet Corn, Ginger Powder, etc and Many More..!!

Name: La Vita Bio Società Cooperativa Agricola
Description:
La nostra Azienda si trova in una zona altamente vocata alla coltivazione di ortaggi, terra del sole, del mare e con particolari condizioni climatiche che consentono di ottenere prodotti unici, con il gusto tipico della Sicilia.
L’Azienda nasce dalla volontà di dare una continuità al prodotto agricolo biologico coltivato direttamente dai soci, garantendo il controllo della filiera, per dare ai nostri consumatori un prodotto siciliano di eccellenza.
La filiera corta, oltre che garanzia di qualità, dà all’azienda la possibilità di produrre con il contenimento dei costi per offrire un prodotto con ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo.

Name: O.P. AOA
Description:
L' O.P. A.O.A. ( Associazione Ortofrutticoltori Agro S.C.A.R.L.) è stata costituita nel 1980 a Scafati (SA) al confine tra la provincia di Napoli e Salerno.

L’ubicazione in un areale di produzione caratterizzato da terreno vulcanico e da condizioni climatiche miti ha determinato, nei primi tempi, una specializzazione produttiva orientata principalmente alla coltivazione del Pomodoro San Marzano e di altri prodotti tipici campani.
L' A.O.A., con 19 Cooperative associate ed oltre 412 produttori coinvolti principalmente in Campania, Puglia, è una delle principali realtà produttive che opera nel settore agroindustriale del centro – sud Italia e rappresenta un punto di riferimento per le politiche settoriali nazionali.
Oggi l’orientamento produttivo dell’Organizzazione è quello di ampliare la gamma delle produzioni orientandosi sempre di più al mercato dei prodotti freschi.
Rimane comunque inalterato l’impegno per ottenere la massima salubrità delle produzioni, la salvaguardia dei Produttori Agricoli e la tutela della salute dei consumatori, attraverso processi di produzione di ambiente ed agricoltura sostenibile.
Il perseguimento della qualità totale ha consentito ai nostri produttori di ottenere importanti certificazioni tra cui la GlobalGAP, ovvero il rispetto degli standard produttivi richiesti dalla grande distribuzione europea.

Name: MENEX doo
Description:

We have our own fruit production, as well as a cooperation and the largest number of our producers collect fruits on the heights over 1000 m2 above sea level. 

Thanks to the microclimate elements and the heights above sea level, these regions are characterized by the minimal presence of insects and the nonexistence of industrial pollution, while the complete fruit production is of an extensive type.

Name: Potenciel.kréol
Description:
Chez Pot-en-Ciel Kréol, nous sommes dévoués à vous offrir une expérience gustative unique en transformant des fruits et légumes 100% La Réunion. 
Nous nous approvisionnons auprès de producteurs bio et d'agriculteurs engagés dans des pratiques agricoles raisonnées. Notre objectif est clair : vous proposez des recettes délicieuses qui allient gourmandise et bien-être nutritionnel. Grâce à notre large gamme de produit lactofermenté : condiment, sauce , recette , légume découpé , kombucha , kéfir , confruit ou marmelade. 
Notre secret réside dans la lactofermentation, une méthode qui préserve les nutriments tout en enrichissant nos produits de prébiotiques et probiotiques bénéfiques pour votre microbiote. Ainsi, prenez soin de votre santé en douceur.
Nous vous proposons une variété de produits, du frais, du cru, et même du ni cru ni cuit. Tous ces délices sont élaborés dans notre conserverie, en respectant les normes européennes d'hygiène les plus strictes. Notre démarche est globale, car nous pensons que l'entreprise peut être une force positive pour la planète. Nous nous engageons à vous apporter une alimentation saine, diététique et bio, tout en restant accessible. 
Notre collaboration étroite avec nos partenaires agriculteurs va au -Au-delà de l'approvisionnement. Nous transformons également les légumes et les fruits trop petits, grands ou en excès en produits de qualité.
Ensemble, nous pouvons agir pour demain en soutenant une alimentation équilibrée, des pratiques agricoles durables et une économie locale prospère. Avec Pot-en-Ciel Kréol, chaque bouchée est un pas vers un avenir plus sain et respectueux de notre planète
